text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser isn't feeling especially well,
so I take her to rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for making you worry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get plenty of rest until I'm good and
healthy. Nighty night now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mun... Hmmm? This is... umm...

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Welcome home. You're taking it easy today,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared a full-course meal with all your
favorites. Make sure you fill that belly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you two doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, what do you mean by "full
course"? We have meal sets at our restaurant.
There is no full course...

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hush now. First, we've got that sea urchin soupe
de poisson you love, and sea bream sauté for the
main dish.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! I've never even heard of those!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? You've always been
incredibly fond of full-course French cuisine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I've never eaten any of that stuff! I mean poison soup?! Are you for real?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I just want my usual! I want that ordinarily yummy
flavor, so I can be ordinarily happy. It's just not
home without it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Please, gods! Give that ordinary flavor back to
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! This is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: B-b-b-booyah! I'm back to my everyday life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is thoroughly refreshed after
successfully escaping from her nightmare!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well... Maybe once in a while is okay! Ehehe, let's
give it a shot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a second! This is made of wax! I'm gonna
break into hives if I eat this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bwuh... It was just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What was all that anyway? I mean, sea urchin
poison soup?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's condition fails to improve
due to her unsettling dream.
